reasoning: Latin i → Umbrian e and final -to → -tu (cf. canito → kanetu, sisto → sestu).
Latin i → e, -ct- → -ht-, and final -um → -u (cf. sanctam → sahta, auctor → uhtur).
‘For’ is Umbrian enclitic -per attached to the noun (cf. puplu-per, Petrunia-per).
Latin au → uh, o → u, and final -s → -f (cf. auctor → uhtur, ovis → uvef).
Latin o → u and final -um → -u (cf. ferto → fertu, istum → estu).
Prefix in- → en-, i → e, and -to → -tu (cf. istum → estu, canito → kanetu).
